component.name: Sidebar
component.description: Full application sidebar navigation system with collapsible states, mobile sheet fallback, grouped menus, and tooltip support.

useCases: Collapsible sidebar with icon-only mode for compact layouts
Multi-section navigation with grouped menu items and sub-menus
Mobile navigation via sheet overlay with hamburger toggle

commonPatterns.name: basic-sidebar-layout
commonPatterns.description: Standard sidebar layout with provider, sidebar, and main content

commonPatterns.name: collapsible-icon-sidebar
commonPatterns.description: Sidebar that collapses to icon-only mode with tooltips

commonPatterns.name: floating-variant
commonPatterns.description: Sidebar with rounded floating appearance and inset spacing

antiPatterns.scenario: Using Sidebar sub-components outside of SidebarProvider
antiPatterns.reason: useSidebar hook throws if no SidebarProvider is found in the tree
antiPatterns.alternative: Always wrap the layout with SidebarProvider

antiPatterns.scenario: Using collapsible='icon' without tooltip on SidebarMenuButton
antiPatterns.reason: When collapsed to icons, buttons have no visible label — tooltips provide the only context
antiPatterns.alternative: Always pass a tooltip string to SidebarMenuButton when using icon collapsible mode

antiPatterns.scenario: Placing SidebarInset outside of the SidebarProvider
antiPatterns.reason: SidebarInset uses peer selectors that depend on the Sidebar being a sibling within the provider
antiPatterns.alternative: Keep Sidebar and SidebarInset as siblings inside SidebarProvider

antiPatterns.reason: Sidebar and SidebarInset must be siblings, not parent-child
antiPatterns.alternative: Place both as direct children of SidebarProvider

semanticMeaning.sidebar: Standard sidebar with border, flush against the viewport edge
semanticMeaning.floating: Rounded sidebar with border, shadow, and inset padding
semanticMeaning.inset: Sidebar with inset variant background blending

collapsible.description: offcanvas slides out entirely; icon collapses to icon-width; none is always expanded

slots.provider: SidebarProvider manages open/collapsed state, mobile detection, and keyboard shortcut (Cmd+B)
slots.sidebar: Sidebar renders the sidebar rail with variant, side, and collapsible props
slots.header: SidebarHeader for logo, branding, or user avatar at the top
slots.footer: SidebarFooter for user info, settings, or secondary actions at the bottom
slots.group: SidebarGroup organizes related menu items with optional label and action
slots.groupLabel: SidebarGroupLabel section heading that hides in icon-collapsed mode
slots.groupAction: SidebarGroupAction button positioned at the top-right of a group
slots.groupContent: SidebarGroupContent wrapper for the menu list
slots.menu: SidebarMenu ul element for menu items
slots.menuItem: SidebarMenuItem li wrapper for a single menu entry
slots.menuButton: SidebarMenuButton the interactive element with active state, tooltip, and asChild support
slots.menuAction: SidebarMenuAction contextual action button on a menu item (e.g., more options)
slots.menuBadge: SidebarMenuBadge count or status badge on a menu item
slots.menuSub: SidebarMenuSub nested sub-menu list with left border
slots.menuSubItem: SidebarMenuSubItem li wrapper for sub-menu entries
slots.menuSubButton: SidebarMenuSubButton interactive element for sub-menu items
slots.trigger: SidebarTrigger hamburger button that toggles the sidebar
slots.rail: SidebarRail invisible drag/click strip on the sidebar edge for toggling
slots.inset: SidebarInset main content area that responds to sidebar state
slots.input: SidebarInput search input styled for the sidebar context
slots.skeleton: SidebarMenuSkeleton loading placeholder for menu items

parentConstraints: SidebarProvider must be the outermost wrapper
Sidebar and SidebarInset must be siblings inside SidebarProvider

interactions.toggle: SidebarTrigger or Cmd/Ctrl+B toggles between expanded and collapsed (desktop) or open/closed (mobile)
interactions.rail: SidebarRail is an invisible edge strip that toggles sidebar on click
interactions.menuButton: Hover highlights; active state shown via data-active attribute; tooltip shown when collapsed
interactions.menuAction: Optional action button on menu items; can be set to show only on hover via showOnHover
interactions.cookie: Sidebar state (open/collapsed) persisted to a cookie named sidebar_state with 7-day expiry

responsive.mobile: Sidebar renders inside a Sheet overlay; toggled via SidebarTrigger; 18rem width
responsive.desktop: Inline sidebar at 14rem expanded, 3rem collapsed (icon mode); content area adjusts via CSS

accessibility.role: Navigation sidebar; mobile renders as a Sheet dialog with sr-only title
accessibility.keyboardSupport: Cmd/Ctrl+B toggles sidebar; Tab navigates menu items; Space/Enter activates buttons; focus-visible ring on all interactive elements
accessibility.screenReader: SidebarTrigger has sr-only 'Toggle Sidebar' label; mobile Sheet has sr-only title and description; SidebarGroupLabel visible as section heading
accessibility.focusManagement: Focus ring via ring-sidebar-ring token; collapsed icon mode hides overflow content

rules: SidebarProvider must wrap both Sidebar and SidebarInset
Sidebar state is persisted in a cookie (sidebar_state) for 7 days
Cmd/Ctrl+B keyboard shortcut toggles the sidebar
Sidebar width is controlled via CSS custom properties: --sidebar-width (14rem) and --sidebar-width-icon (3rem)
Mobile sidebar width is 18rem and uses Sheet component
collapsible='icon' hides text labels and shows only icons at 3rem width; sub-menus and group labels are hidden
collapsible='none' renders a static sidebar with no toggle capability
SidebarMenuButton supports asChild for rendering as links or custom elements
SidebarMenuButton tooltip only shows when sidebar is collapsed and not on mobile
SidebarMenuAction with showOnHover=true only appears on hover/focus (desktop)
SidebarInset uses peer CSS selectors to respond to sidebar state changes
alternatives: Navigation bar for simpler top-level nav

aiHints.context: Use as the primary application navigation sidebar. Requires the full provider pattern: SidebarProvider > [Sidebar, SidebarInset]. Supports three visual variants (sidebar, floating, inset) and three collapsible modes (offcanvas, icon, none). Always add tooltips to SidebarMenuButton when using icon collapsible mode. Mobile automatically falls back to a Sheet overlay. The useSidebar hook provides state and toggle functions.
